SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class MessageThreadItem

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.MessageThreadItem
public class MessageThreadItem extends Object
Represents a single direct message thread between two users.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MessageThreadItem()
    creates an empty message thread object for Firebase
    MessageThreadItem(String threadId, String userOneUid, String userOneName, String userTwoUid, String userTwoName, String lastMessageText, long lastMessageAt, String lastSenderUid)
    creates a message thread object

    Description

    gets the time of the last message

  • Constructor Details

    • MessageThreadItem

      public MessageThreadItem()
      creates an empty message thread object for Firebase

    • MessageThreadItem

      public MessageThreadItem(String threadId, String userOneUid, String userOneName, String userTwoUid, String userTwoName, String lastMessageText, long lastMessageAt, String lastSenderUid)
      creates a message thread object
      Parameters:
      threadId - the String id of the thread
      userOneUid - the uid of the first user
      userOneName - the name of the first user
      userTwoUid - the uid of the second user
      userTwoName - the name of the second user
      lastMessageText - the preview text of the last message
      lastMessageAt - the time of the last message
      lastSenderUid - the uid of the last sender

      gets the thread id
